name: wool_out_of_lives_title
description: Display lettering reading exactly "Out of Lives" in the same chunky cream felt and yarn-stitched family as the win title, arched over a muted dusty-blue knitted ribbon, with one small tangled yarn knot and a drooping loose strand above.
prompt_extra: requested text exactly Out of Lives; somber but cozy and never frightening; wide fail-card composition; no extra words

variants.name: tangle
variants.prompt_extra: tangled knot clearly visible, cool muted ribbon

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: simpler loose strand motif and strongest lettering readability
